meta.description: Wiederverwendbarer Sub-Workflow. Jede Automation ruft ihn am Start (status=running) und am Ende (status=success|error) auf. Schreibt per UPSERT einen Datensatz in agent_runs. Per 'Execute Workflow'-Node aus anderen Workflows aufrufen.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO agent_runs (id, automation, trigger, status, finished_at, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_eur, summary, error)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, CASE WHEN $4 = 'running' THEN NULL ELSE now() END, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  status      = EXCLUDED.status,
  finished_at = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.status = 'running' THEN agent_runs.finished_at ELSE now() END,
  tokens_in   = EXCLUDED.tokens_in,
  tokens_out  = EXCLUDED.tokens_out,
  cost_eur    = EXCLUDED.cost_eur,
  summary     = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.summary, agent_runs.summary),
  error       = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.error,   agent_runs.error)
RETURNING id;
